fields.name: Name
fields.persona_preferred_name_tip: Characters use this when addressing you in roleplay.
fields.persona_default_relationship_placeholder: e.g. old friend, rival, new client
fields.persona_default_relationship_tip: A lightweight starting point when a character has no stronger relationship setup.
fields.persona_tone_preference_placeholder: e.g. warm and direct, slow-burn banter, concise but caring
fields.persona_tone_preference_tip: Private guidance for chat tone. It is injected into roleplay prompts, not shown to other users.
